default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss upcoming events and coordinate logistics, particularly for a dinner with Madrona and an inbound workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Luma platform used for event management; Marcel walked Jason through invite process](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Madrona dinner facing challenges: low RSVPs, conflicting with other events, considering rescheduling or expanding invite list](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Recent marketing efforts (influencers) deemed low quality; exploring Beehive for targeted advertising](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Multiple events in pipeline: Madrona dinner, inbound workshop, summit, Surge happy hour](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

## Topics

### Luma Event Management

  - [Marcel demonstrated Luma platform functionality](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Invite process: select guests, use "+1 invited" option, customize email template](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [3,800 people invited to upcoming workshop](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Text message reminders available for attendees](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Jason to handle some invite processes moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

### Marketing and Promotion Strategies

  - [Newsletter, LinkedIn posts planned for event promotion](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Influencer marketing attempt yielded poor results (800 likes, but "garbage" engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Exploring Beehive for targeted advertising:](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Pay-per-click model with $300 max spend](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [Allows direct inventory access for newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

### Madrona Dinner Challenges

  - [Event scheduled in 10 days, but facing low RSVPs](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Conflicting with other event promotions (inbound workshop, Surge event)](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Options discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
    1.  Expand invite list beyond founders to include go-to-market leaders
    2.  Request rescheduling with Madrona
  - [Marcel expressed anxiety about filling the room in time](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

### Other Events

  - [Summit: Date needs to be finalized](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Surge happy hour: Ongoing discussion with Bradley and Nick](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Inbound workshop: Promotion efforts underway](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [Okta logo usage issue: Marcel playing "dumb" for 5 days to avoid immediate action](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [GrowthX experiencing a record week with numerous opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to sign up for Beehive advertising platform](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Jason to draft message to Madrona about dinner challenges (within 1-2 hours)](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
      - [Propose rescheduling or expanding invite list](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [Cite current flood of opportunities as reason](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Finalize date for the summit](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Continue coordination with Bradley and Nick for Surge happy hour](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Proceed with promotion efforts for inbound workshop](https://fathom.video/share/mbRAVsR_3P-VproFdXa331JTsdjvVCcx?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

action_items.description: Contact Madrona re: dinner event. Propose 2 options - reschedule or open to go-to-market leaders. Cite high opportunity volume as reason. Do within 1-2 hours.
